{{Infobox character
| name = Old Man Lo
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Old Man Lo]] wears a pressed purple uniform.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Old Man Lo]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Old Man Lo]] can move in a blur.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Old Man Lo]] once argued with a woman from the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
